hypothesis: For any generative model and dataset, computing the Earth Mover's Distance over formation energies predicted by an ML regressor retrained on a stratified, DFT-relaxed subset comprising at most 5% of the generated samples will yield an EMD that correlates with the SUN stability fraction (energy-above-hull ≤0.1 eV/atom) with Pearson r ≥ 0.8 on a held-out set of generated structures.
